input.command:
cd /d/mybot/release-binaries/esp32-v2-8
python - <<'PY'
import struct
data=open('partition-table.bin','rb').read()
TYPES={0:'app',1:'data'}
print(f"{'label':16} {'type':4} {'subtype':>7} {'offset':>10} {'size':>10}")
for i in range(0,len(data),32):
    e=data[i:i+32]
    if e[:2]!=b'\xAA\x50': break
    t,st=e[2],e[3]
    off,size=struct.unpack('<II',e[4:12])
    label=e[12:28].split(b'\x00')[0].d
input.description: Decode ESP32 partition table to verify offsets

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/release-binaries/esp32-v2-8
PY="C:/Users/alice/.espressif/python_env/idf5.0_py3.11_env/Scripts/python.exe"
"$PY" -m esptool --chip esp32s3 -p COM14 -b 460800 \
  --before default_reset --after hard_reset \
  write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 80m --flash_size detect \
  0x0 bootloader.bin \
  0x8000 partition-table.bin \
  0xd000 ota_data_initial.bin \
  0x10000 esp32-v2-fw-spar
input.description: Flash ESP32 firmware on COM14

CFG=/tmp/tool_osx_config.xml
echo "===== full build script (command body) ====="

import re

import html
# extract <command>...</command> blocks
for m in re.findall(r'<command>(.*?)</command>', s, re.S):
    print(html.unescape(m))
    print('==== [end command block] ====')
" | sed -n '1,140p'
